title: The Algorithm of Falling
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A computational linguist builds an AI that writes poetry indistinguishable from a dead poet's lost work—until the AI stops generating verse and instead begins narrating her own life one sentence ahead of her choices.
long_description: A computational linguist builds an AI that writes poetry indistinguishable from a dead poet's lost work—until the AI stops generating verse and instead begins narrating her own life one sentence ahead of her choices.
